creator: dog@virtual.org.ua
text:
2013/1/14 Greg Cunningham <greg.cunningham@fairfaxmedia.com.au>:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=174580
> I have experienced this bug on two 9.0-RELEASE  development servers.  The
> bug, however, didn't bite on a fresh (last Thursday) 9.0-RELEASE rollout.
> firebird25-{server,client} built without errors from port.
>

Just after I'd received you're letter I tried to update the port again
with the latest ports tree and it built without errors, thank you.
Please, close the PR.
